business_context.name: Dekorix
business_context.target_audience: Homeowners and businesses looking for premium, reliable, and clean renovation and painting services.

headings.notes: Use for H1 to H4. H1 should not exceed text-6xl.

colors.notes: Background is Warm Sand. Primary is Deep Forest Green for trust/architectural feel. Secondary is Terracotta for warm, action-oriented CTAs.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use generous padding (p-8 to p-12) for inner sections.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: MODE A: Tetris Grid for services. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with varied spans (e.g., col-span-8, col-span-4) and wide gaps (gap-8).

surfaces.hero_overlay: bg-black/40 to ensure text readability over the background image without killing the image entirely.
surfaces.header: Crystal Glass strategy. bg-[#F7F7F2]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#D5D5C8]/50 shadow-sm.
surfaces.cards: Clay & Crisp. Background matches parent or slightly lighter. 1px solid border-[#D5D5C8], no heavy shadows by default, subtle lift and shadow-lg on hover.

media.description: Room under renovation with tools. Great for hero background showing real work. Add black/40 overlay.
Painter in protective suit preparing for indoor home renovation.
Spacious finished room featuring blue walls. Perfect for 'After' showcase.
Modern kitchen living area with natural light. Perfect for 'After' showcase.

components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn UI (Input, Textarea, Button). Customize borders to match theme, use Terracotta for submit button. Input backgrounds should be white or #EAEADF.
components_strategy.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right corner with high z-index (z-50). Use standard WhatsApp green (#25D366) with a subtle pulse animation for visibility.
components_strategy.navigation: Visible on desktop. Logo left, Nav links center, Teklif Al (Quote) CTA right.
components_strategy.gallery: Bento-style or 2-column grid showing before/after results or high-end finished spaces.

animation_and_interaction.hover_states: Interactive elements must lift (-translate-y-1) and cast shadow-md. Always set explicit hover text colors.
animation_and_interaction.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is highly recommended.
animation_and_interaction.entrance: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-up of bento grid items on scroll.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (WhatsApp button, form submit, nav links) MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-contact-btn').
